content.problemStatement: Write a program for the coding challenge "Number of Palindromes". Refer to LeetCode description: https://www.spoj.com/problems/NUMOFPAL/
constraints: S contains only lowercase English letters
content.inputFormat: The first line contains an integer T, the number of test cases. Then for each test case, there is a string S of length N.
content.outputFormat: For each test case, print the number of palindromic substrings in the given string.

solution.approach: Use a nested loop to generate all possible substrings and check if each one is a palindrome.
